name: restaurant finance managers processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant finance managers processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide daily cash flow summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem_solved: inability to track daily cash flow accurately
features: manual entry for daily cash flow data
